templates.subject: ID Card Request
templates.emailSubjectLine: Digital ID Card | UnitedHealthOne - Golden Rule Insurance Co.
templates.body:
Hello {memberName},

As requested, a copy of your digital ID card for your {planName} is attached to this email for your convenience.

Please review the information on the ID card to ensure it is accurate. You may print the card or save it to your mobile device for easy access when receiving healthcare services.

Please do not reply to this message, as it was sent from a 'no-reply' mailbox. If you have any questions or need assistance, please call us at 1-800-657-8205.

templates.subject: ID Card Request - Health ProtectorGuard
templates.emailSubjectLine: Health ProtectorGuard Digital ID Card | UnitedHealthOne - Golden Rule Insurance Co.
templates.body:
Hello {memberName},

As requested, a copy of your digital ID card for your {planName} is attached to this email for your convenience.

As part of your {planName} plan, you also receive access to an Optum Perks prescription discount card, which is typically mailed separately. If you would like a digital copy, you can obtain one online by visiting https://perks.optum.com/uho and sending the card directly to your mobile device.

To take advantage of your prescription savings, please present both your ID card and your Optum Perks discount card at the pharmacy. If your plan includes eligible prescription benefits, presenting the Optum Perks card will automatically initiate the claims process for reimbursement under your plan, eliminating the need to submit a separate claim.

If you have any questions regarding your Optum Perks prescription discount card, please contact Optum Perks Customer Support at 1-866-407-8901 for assistance.

Please do not reply to this message, as it was sent from a 'no-reply' mailbox. If you have any questions or need assistance, please call us at 1-800-657-8205.

Please review the information on the ID card to ensure it is accurate. You may print the card or save it to your mobile device for easy access when receiving healthcare services.

For questions regarding claims or benefits related to your dental policy, please contact UnitedHealthcare Dental Customer Service at 1-877-816-3596.

Please do not reply to this message, as it was sent from a 'no-reply' mailbox. If you have any questions or need assistance, please call us at 1-800-657-8205.
